mapper.sql: id, bug_id, content, attachments, created_by, create_time
mapper.select: select from jiedan_bug_update where bug_id = #{bugId} order by id asc
select u.id, u.bug_id, u.content, u.attachments, u.created_by, u.create_time from jiedan_bug_update u join jiedan_bug b on b.id = u.bug_id where b.order_id = #{orderId} order by u.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into jiedan_bug_update (bug_id, content, attachments, created_by, create_time) values (#{bugId}, #{content}, #{attachments}, #{createdBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: update jiedan_bug_update set attachments = #{attachments} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from jiedan_bug_update where bug_id in (select id from jiedan_bug where order_id = #{orderId})
